---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem would this feature solve? Keep the focus on the user need,
not the implementation. Example: "It is hard to track who is online without
having to tab out of the game and check Discord." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How do you imagine this working? Be as specific or as loose as you like.
If you have API or command syntax in mind, sketch it out. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why did you rule them out?
Leave blank if this is the first idea you had. -->

## Integration Impact

<!-- Check all that apply and add details where needed -->

- [ ] **DiscordSRV** — Would this change require a new webhook event type or
      a change to the payload format?
- [ ] **RCON** — Would this change require new server commands?
- [ ] **AdvancedBans** — Would this change require new database queries or
      write access to the punishments table?
- [ ] **Database schema** — Does this need a new SQLite table or column?
- [ ] **Environment variables** — Would new secrets or settings be needed?
